description_long: This is a compact, modern two-seater sofa upholstered in a muted blue fabric. The sofa features clean, straight lines with a boxy silhouette, giving it a contemporary urban appeal. It has two individual seat cushions and two matching backrest cushions, all of which appear to be attached and uniformly sized. The armrests are straight, medium-height, and extend from the base to the top of the backrest, providing a structured look. The sofa stands on four short, slightly tapered legs, likely made of wood or metal, which are positioned at each corner for stability. The upholstery is solid in color with a smooth, matte finish and no visible decorative patterns or stitching.
description: A modern, blue two-seater sofa with straight armrests, attached cushions, and short corner legs. The design is clean, boxy, and upholstered in solid, smooth fabric.
description_view_0: Front view shows two attached seat and back cushions, straight armrests, and the sofa's overall boxy shape.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the medium-height, straight armrest and the sofa's depth, with the backrest and seat cushions visible in profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the plain, solid back panel and the two rear legs, with no visible decorative features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the straight armrest and the sofa's depth from the other side.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two attached, uniformly sized seat cushions and two matching attached backrest cushions, arranged side by side.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, boxy armrests at medium height, flush with the seat and backrest, with no visible decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, slightly tapered legs positioned at each corner, likely wood or metal, with a simple exposed design.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest with two attached, uniform cushions and a continuous, unsegmented structure.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid blue fabric with a smooth, matte texture and no visible patterns or decorative stitching.
